thag14.2:1.1: Just as a fine, well-bred bull
thag14.2:1.2: yoked to a load, enduring his load,
thag14.2:2.1: so, too, those who are filled with discernment
thag14.2:3.1: Having fallen in time under the sway of time,
thag14.2:3.2: having come under the sway of becoming & not-,
thag14.2:4.2: cast down by causes of pain,
thag14.2:4.4: not seeing them for what they are.
thag14.2:5.1: While those who, in the midst of pleasure & pain
thag14.2:5.3: stand firm like a boundary pillar,
thag14.2:7.2: like a water bead on a lotus.
thag14.2:7.3: Everywhere they are happy, the enlightened,
thag14.2:7.4:
everywhere un- defeated.
No matter what the unrighteous gain
thag14.2:8.4:
than if there were unrighteous gain.
No matter what
thag14.2:9.2: or the lowliness of those who know,
thag14.2:9.3: the lowliness of those who know is better,
thag14.2:9.4:
not the status of those unaware.
No matter what
thag14.2:10.2: or the censure from those who know,
thag14.2:10.3: the censure from those who know is better
thag14.2:10.4: than if there were praise from fools.
thag14.2:11.1: And as for the pleasure from sensuality
thag14.2:11.3: the pain from seclusion is better
thag14.2:11.4: than if there were pleasure from sensuality.
thag14.2:12.1: And as for living through unrighteousness
thag14.2:12.4: than if one were to live through unrighteousness.
thag14.2:13.2: whose minds are calmed from becoming & non-,
thag14.2:13.4: For them there is nothing dear or undear.
